title: Commands Table format messed up in docs.podman.io
body:
I've not idea off the top of my head how to fix this, but did want to note that the table under the Commands heading is one long continuous line.  http://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman.1.html#commands  

Something has obviously gone wrong translating the md to html, but I know not where and haven't divd in.

comments.body:
Perhaps one of our community people have an idea?
@Luap99 @zhangguanzhang Any ideas?
